result.stdout:
Usage:
To encrypt a plaintext string with a generated password:
encryptiontool encrypt <plaintext>
To encrypt a plaintext string with a specific password:
encryptiontool encrypt <plaintext> <password>
To decrypt an encrypted string:
encryptiontool decrypt <encrypted data> <password>

commands.payload:
Usage:
To encrypt a plaintext string with a generated password:
encryptiontool encrypt <plaintext>
To encrypt a plaintext string with a specific password:
encryptiontool encrypt <plaintext> <password>
To decrypt an encrypted string:
encryptiontool decrypt <encrypted data> <password>
